creator: kiri@pis.toba-cmt.ac.jp
text:
eyeclock port has been ported. This port is A clock application for X. 

I put the port packed with tar czf and uuencode below "Fix:"

Packed tarball is :
-rw-r--r--  1 kiri  staff  1207 Sep  4 15:40 eyeclock-1.0-980904.tar.gz
